title: ToolTrust Security Report
description: Standard schema for AgentSentry security reports stored in the ToolTrust Directory.

tool_id.description: Unique, kebab-case identifier for the tool. Must match the report filename (without .json).

version.description: Version string of the tool that was scanned (semver preferred, but any tag/release name accepted).

grade.description: Letter grade derived from risk_score (A=0-9, B=10-24, C=25-49, D=50-74, F=75+).

risk_score.description: Composite risk score calculated as sum(SeverityWeight_i * FindingCount_i).

scan_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the scan was performed.

scanner.description: Scanner name and version that produced this report.

source_url.description: Canonical URL of the tool's source repository or registry page.

category.description: Functional category, matching mcpmarket.com taxonomy (e.g. Developer Tools, Database Management).

vendor.description: GitHub organisation or user that owns the tool repository.

license.description: SPDX license identifier reported by GitHub (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0).

stars.description: GitHub star count at the time of the scan.

language.description: Primary programming language reported by GitHub.

findings.description: List of security findings discovered during the scan.

methodology.description: URL pointing to the methodology document used for this scan.

title.description: Short, human-readable title for the finding.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the vulnerability or weakness.

recommendation.description: Actionable guidance for the tool maintainer to remediate the finding.
